cards.hook: Working in crypto but ashamed to admit it?
cards.caption: Working in crypto but too embarrassed to say it out loud? A DeFi dev since 2021 asks HN the question nobody posts. The honest thread my feed kept while the timeline hyped coins.
cards.stance: The most interesting people in crypto are the ones quietly questioning it.

cards.hook: Here's what happened in crypto today
cards.caption: Generic daily crypto roundup with no actual story or number — pure filler. Rejected: no hook, no contrast, nothing my feed would keep.

cards.hook: Tokenized stocks just hit $34B/month — up 40x in a year.
cards.caption: Tokenized stocks are doing $34B/month, up 40x in 13 months. Nvidia, Tesla, Micron now trade as RWAs on-chain. TradFi is quietly moving to DeFi rails. Found before the timeline noticed.
cards.stance: RWAs are the real crypto adoption story — not another memecoin.

cards.hook: Weekly gamedev update: cleaning up code this week
cards.caption: Personal gamedev housekeeping log — no showcase, no hook, off-context for a crypto feed. Rejected.

cards.hook: Help me pick a game idea to build
cards.caption: Personal help-request post, no curated value, off-niche for this feed. Rejected.
Bare link dump with hashtag spam, no substance. Rejected.

cards.hook: Working in crypto but ashamed to admit it?
cards.caption: Duplicate of card-01 (same Ask HN crypto-shame thread). Keeping card-01 instead to avoid reposting the same content.

cards.hook: A retro survival-horror demo where the nightmare shifts as you play.
cards.caption: Scarlet Lake: a retro survival-horror demo where detective Ben Murphy digs into a town that keeps changing on him. Playable now. The indie gem my feed surfaced before the hype.
